title: NUTTDOO BBQ Metal Skewers Stainless Steel,20 PCS air Fryer skewers,7.63"/19.4cm Metal Skewer for Oven Halloween Christmas Party Turkey,BBQ Skewers
features: Length and Quantity: Metal Skewers length 7.63inch/19.4cm, 2.0mm thick.Quantity:20PCS. They are very suitable for holding a large amount of food. A set of 20 is an ideal choice for small picnics or sharing with friends and neighbors.

High Quality: The metal string is made of high-quality stainless steel, which has excellent corrosion resistance and wear resistance All edges around the metal grilled meat skewers are polished for safe use. Unlike traditional bamboo sticks and wooden sticks, they are reusable

Wide Application:This type of metal skewer is very suitable for turkeys, geese, and poultry. Metal skewers have a wide range of uses and can be used in ovens, grills, and barbecues to cook delicious foods such as Adana grilled meat skewers, grilled meat, jacketed potatoes, marshmallows, vegetables, and fruits. They can also be used as cake test skewers and baked potato ears. Suitable for barbecue parties, cocktail parties, Christmas parties, birthday parties, weddings, etc. Enjoy barbecue time with family and friends

Easy to Clean: Our metal skewers have a smooth metal surface, ensuring that grilled food residue does not stick to them. After use, simply clean these metal strings with warm water, hand wash with a mild detergent, and then dry or air dry. Reusable, unlike wooden sticks and bamboo poles.

Attention: Please use the barbecue Skewers correctly, as the skewers tip is very sharp and there is a risk of piercing your hands during the grilling process. Please wear safety gloves to prevent injury to your hands during use. If you have any questions about our products or services, please contact us and we will provide you with satisfactory solutions
description: Product Description Our metal barbecue skewers make it easy for you to grill anything you want. Barbecue skewers are made of sturdy stainless steel. They can withstand high temperatures, have a smooth surface that is very easy to clean, and can be used repeatedly! You can use them to grill various delicious foods. They are essential items for the barbecue season and can also be used on grills, electric grills, and hot plates Can be used for picnicking, camping, barbecuing, etc. It is ideal to use marshmallows together during camping. Provide food with a professional appearance. Great travel accessories.
